findings.evidence: In the PDF, Figure 1 and Figure 2 are bar graphs. In the HTML, these images are entirely missing. Instead, the textual labels, axis numbers, and data points from the charts have been extracted and rendered as unstructured plain text, completely losing the visual representation of the data.
Figure 7 is a combined bar and line chart in the PDF. In the HTML, the image is missing and has been replaced by a run-on sequence of numbers extracted from the chart's axes and data labels.
Figure 9 is a combined bar and line chart in the PDF. The HTML version omits the image entirely and replaces it with unstructured text blocks of the axis numbers.
Figure 11 is a combined bar and line chart in the PDF. In the HTML, the visual chart is absent, replaced by a text dump of the axis values.
